post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 206: Math Camp Mafia v2

If you're not currently alive in this game, do not post. If you want to join a game, go to the Signups thread. If you want to learn how Mafia works, see the FAQ thread. (The game is over.)

Credits to Binomial-theorem, chaotic_iak, willwang123, and fdas among others for the rule template.
  • Rules
    • Read the rules. All of them. Read them multiple times if necessary.
    • Do not post at night.
    • You may use your role PM to ask questions, such as rule clarifications or anything else.
    • Do not quote or pretend to quote any communication from the mods, including role PMs. Paraphrase!
    • Do not talk about this game outside of this topic to anyone other than the mods in charge, unless you are specifically given permission to do so.
    • Do not talk about other ongoing games in this thread.
    • You may not use any formatting that has an effect of concealing text. This includes size=1, hide="", color=#FFFFFF, and color=white, among others.
    • Hide tags are allowed as long as they conform to the above rule.
    • Do not edit or delete posts you have already submitted, even for things like typos: what goes in the thread stays in the thread. Instead, use EBWOP or EBWON as necessary.
    • If you are dead, do not post anything else about the game anywhere. You may still spectate the game, but you may no longer post in this thread.
    • Do not abuse loopholes.

  • Voting and Hanging
    • This game is based on deadline hang. This means that the player with the greatest number of votes at the deadline will be hanged.
    • If there is a tie at the deadline, the hang will be randomly chosen from the players with the greatest number of votes.
    • Starting Day 2, if a player reaches a majority of votes, then that player will be hanged.
    • Post votes in bold font in the format "Vote: <insert player here>". For example, "Vote: fdas" is an acceptable vote, while "Vote: fDAs", "Vote: fdas", "Vote fdas", “vote: fdas, "Vote:fdas", "Vote: fads", "Vote: fdsa", and "Vote: fdas" are not.
    • Spell the username of the player you wish to vote for exactly and do not use nicknames. There is one exception to this; see below.
    • For the purpose of voting, l (lowercase L) and I (uppercase i) are identical.
    • Votes in quotes or hide or tip tags will not be counted.
    • Votes are locked in Lylo.
    • Improperly made votes will not be counted under any circumstances. It does not matter if it is the end of the game hammer and everyone revealed their roles. Hint: don’t reveal your roles and declare victory until the mods say the game is officially over. If you want to purposely fake vote, give the mods a heads up in your role PM so it is not accidentally counted.
    • You may vote for a no hang to occur during day. Vote this by including in your post "Vote: No Hang".
    • If there is an even number of players, half of the players voting for no hang is considered a majority, but only for no hang.
    • You do not have to unvote before making a new vote, but if you wish to, unvote in the format "Unvote". An unvote will undo your previous vote, if any.
    • The moment the deadline passes (or majority is reached, if it is enabled), no more votes will be counted even if the mod has not made a post, and the game will proceed into twilight.
    • During twilight, players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
    • Once the end-of-day scene is posted, the person hanged is officially dead and their role will be revealed. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.

  • Activity
    • Put effort into the game. The moderators will prod you first and then replace you (36 hours after a prod) if you don't play the game. Generally, you will be prodded if you do not post for 36 hours.
    • If the moderators get tired of repeatedly prodding you, you'll be replaced.
    • Each day will be 10 days (240 hours). The moderators may extend the deadline for the end of the day at their discretion. Note that this will be unlikely and will usually only happen in circumstances of extreme inactivity or replacements too close to end of day.
    • The night deadline will be 2 days after night begins.
    • When the night deadline is met, if the moderator does not receive a night action from either a player or their partner(s) (if they have them), the player will lose their chance to perform an action during that night.
    • Any night results will be sent after the night deadline.
    • Night will end some time after the night deadline when the mods make the post announcing the end of night. You may not post until the moderators say you can, even if the night deadline has passed.
    • If a player is going to be in V/LA (vacation/limited access; i.e., less available to play the game for some time), they must post in bold in-thread or PM the mods. The moderators will not prod the player during the V/LA unless the V/LA is too long.
    • Mafia may access their QT during the day, and are encouraged to use it during the day. Planning night actions during the day is also probably a good idea as the night phase is only 2 days.
    • Do not excessively spam for the sake of spamming. If you are an outed wolf, for example, don't spam to clog up the thread (a bit of fun is fine, but excessive spam is not). In particular, don't spam just because you're mad or annoyed at getting hanged. If you've read the rules, make sure you've read and understand the setup and the MU article (under the Setup tab). When you're done, say so in your role PM.

  • Etiquette
    •  Do not use inappropriate language.
    •  Do not make any personal attacks.
    •  Follow all of the rules.
    •  Be mature.
    •  For a minor rule infraction, newbies can receive up to three warnings, SE’s up to two, and IC’s one. If a player commits an infraction after they have run out of warnings, or commits a modkill-level infraction, they will be modkilled or force-replaced at the mods' discretion. Please do not do anything bad enough to deserve a modkill.

  • Moderators
    • chess24 is the moderator of Mafia Game 206 and kevinmathz is the co-moderator.
    • Don't post in color. If you do have to post in color, try to avoid green, blue, red, and purple. (using these colors is fine as long as your post doesn't resemble a mod post)
    • The not voting section is to be ignored if it contradicts any other part of the votecount.
    • If an error to the votecount is not pointed out within 5 days, the incorrect votecount will become official.
    • The moderators may change the rules at any time.
    • The moderators have the last say in interpreting the rules.
  • Read all of the rules
Story (credit to kevinmathz)
At a mythical math camp in the year 2020, all was good. However, one day, everyone awoken, to see that kevinmathz and chess24 were nowhere to be found. Since they were roommates, people decided to see if they were in their room.

A student walked up to their room, and realized something weird: The door was not locked. Something inside was pushing against it. That student called for another student to come over and help him push open the really heavy door. Once they opened the door, everyone gathered. There was not a pretty sight for them.

Two dead bodies were in the room. chess24's dead body was pushing the door shut, and kevinmathz was sleeping on his bed....well, not really; there was a pitchfork stuck way into him. Later, it was found that chess24 was killed after someone hit his head with one end of the pitchfork, and that kevinmathz was killed by the pitchfork's sharp edge.

chess24 was hit in the head by the dull end of a pitchfork. He was a Camper with a roommate (Moderator).
kevinmathz was pitchforked. He was a Camper with a roommate (Co-moderator).

They saw the following note, too:
Quote:
We are going to kill you all, one by one. You guys are all dead.

Everyone then knew that there was a group of people trying to kill them all. They had to act quick and stop them.


Setup
Credit to zdtsd and others for reviewing the setup / answering questions.

There are 10 town and 3 mafia in this semi-open setup. First, choose one row or column at random from the table below, to get 4 of the roles:

Then, add 7 VTs, 1 Town Hider, and 1 Mafia Hider to finish the setup. Mafia have a 1-shot factional strongman that allows their factional kill to process before all other actions.

The Hider chooses a player to visit every night. Actions on the hider fail, but if the hider visits either mafia or a player who is killed that night, then the hider dies.

All night actions except the Town Vigilante and Mafia Hider are mandatory. The mafia must specifically choose a player to perform the kill, and their strongman may be used by any player. The Mafia Hider cannot both hide and submit the kill.
Any mandatory night actions that are not submitted will be randomized. If the nightkill is randomized, the performer of the kill will be randomized among the other mafia besides the Hider, unless the Hider is the only one alive.
The Innocent Child may reveal at any time during the day by PMing the mod. I recommend staying hidden as long as possible. If it's the end of the day and the mod isn't around, too bad.
If a JK jails a hider who then dies (by visiting a mafia / someone else who died), the JK will not stop the hider's death. Also, JKs cannot stop Hiders from using their action, as all actions fail on the hider.
If the Mafia Rolecop dies during the night, the other mafia members still receive the result.
If the Town Hider visits the Mafia Hider, the Town Hider still dies.

If both Town Hiders target each other, then they can not die (but also will not receive information about other players' alignments) unless the Mafia uses their 1-shot strongman on one of them, in which case both of them die.

Recommended reading on Hider strategy: https://www.mafiauniverse.com/forums/threads/19920-16-Optimal-Hider-Play-%28by-shortaru%29
You do not have to follow this (you all can come up with other strategies), but I just want everyone to understand how the Hider role can be used.

Cliffs on other important game info:
Phase lengths: 10 days/2 days
Deadline hang
Mafia have daychat
There's a confirm rule.


Role PMs
Town Roles
Town Hider wrote:
Hi [player], you are an Annoyed Camper (Town Hider).

You are a camper. In the past, your roommate stays up until three in the morning watching anime, thus giving you a hard time, and after you complained about your roommate, they moved him out of your room, thus giving you a single room. However, here's the catch - your roommate ax bombed your room before leaving, thus making it unbearable for you. As a result, you decided to never sleep in your own room, and always have sleepovers in other people's rooms, leaving before the adults force you into your own room. Every night, choose a player. Actions targeting you will fail (unless you are strongman killed). If the player you choose is mafia, you die. If the player you choose dies that night, you also die.

You win when all threats to the Town are eliminated. You can find the thread HERE.
Town Jailkeeper wrote:
Hi [player], you are a Residential Assistant (Town Jailkeeper).

You are a residential assistant on night watch, and really like your job. After all, it's fun to joke around with younger kids and hang out with them, doing activities such as Crazy Uno, interviewing your campers, and playing Clash Royale with them. You watch over one person's room starting at 11pm and ending in the early morning, ensuring that nobody visits that room during the night and that the said person doesn't come out during the night. Every night, choose a player. Kills on that player will fail unless one of the kills is a strongman. Actions performed by the player will fail, unless the player is a Hider.

You win when all threats to the Town are eliminated. You can find the thread HERE.
Town Vigilante wrote:
Hi [player], you are a Camp Director (Town Vigilante).

You are the director of camp and thus can kick anyone out of camp. However, you can kick at most one person out per day because if you kick too many out, there will be a lot of complaints to you and their true intentions will not be seen. Every night, you may choose a player. They will be killed.

You win when all threats to the Town are eliminated. You can find the thread HERE.
Town Innocent Child wrote:
Hi [player], you are a Watched Camper (Town Innocent Child).

Your room is next to a security camera that only you can access. However, nobody else can access the security camera or even knows about it. If you wish, you can reveal the security camera tape at any time, thus showing that you were in your room the whole night. Once per game, during the day, you may PM the mod (in your role PM) and state that you would like to be revealed. The mod will publicly (in the thread) reveal you as a Town Innocent Child.

You win when all threats to the Town are eliminated. You can find the thread HERE.
VT wrote:
Hi [player], you are a Normal Camper (Vanilla Townie).

You are a normal camper. You win when all threats to the Town are eliminated. You can find the thread HERE.


Mafia Roles
Mafia Hider wrote:
Hi [player], you are a Annoyed Teaching Assistant (Mafia Hider).

You are a teaching assistant, and you want to get rid of campers because more campers mean more work for you. You hate sleeping in your own room because your room smells like a cross between a dead chicken and burnt oreos. As a result, you decided to never sleep in your own room, and always have sleepovers in other people's rooms, leaving before the adults force you into your own room (unless you choose to attempt to kill a person, for obvious reasons). Your teammates are PLAYER, Mafia ROLE NAME and PLAYER, Mafia ROLE NAME. You may communicate with them privately at any time in the quicktopic HERE. You and your teammates have a mandatory, assigned, factional kill every night. You all also have access to a 1-shot Strongman that may be used on a nightkill.

Every night, you may choose a player. Actions targeting you will fail (unless you are strongman killed). If the player you choose is mafia, you die. If the player you choose dies that night, you also die. (This action is not mandatory.)

You may not both hide and submit the kill on the same night.

You win when parity is reached, or nothing can prevent it from being reached. (Parity means at least half of the living players are mafia.) You can find the thread HERE.
Mafia Jailkeeper wrote:
Hi [player], you are a Double-Jobbed Staff (Mafia Jailkeeper).

You are both a teaching assistant and a residential assistant on night watch, and you want to get rid of campers because more campers mean more work for you. You watch over one person's room starting at 11pm and ending in the early morning, ensuring that nobody visits that room during the night and that the said person doesn't come out during the night. Your teammates are PLAYER, Mafia ROLE NAME and PLAYER, Mafia ROLE NAME. You may communicate with them privately during the day in the quicktopic HERE. You and your teammates have a mandatory, assigned, factional kill every night. You all also have access to a 1-shot Strongman that may be used on a nightkill.

Every night, choose a player. Kills on that player will fail unless one of the kills is a strongman. Actions performed by the player will fail, unless the player is a Hider.

You win when parity is reached, or nothing can prevent it from being reached. (Parity means at least half of the living players are mafia.) You can find the thread HERE.
Mafia Rolecop wrote:
Hi [player], you are a Instructor (Mafia Rolecop).

You are an instructor, and thus can hack into the super secret data file. A long procedure will give you one person's job and role. Your teammates are PLAYER, Mafia ROLE NAME and PLAYER, Mafia ROLE NAME. You may communicate with them privately during the day in the quicktopic HERE. You and your teammates have a mandatory, assigned, factional kill every night. You all also have access to a 1-shot Strongman that may be used on a nightkill.

Every night, choose a player. You will learn their role name but not their alignment. (Though this doesn't matter anyway since you already know their alignment.)

You win when parity is reached, or nothing can prevent it from being reached. (Parity means at least half of the living players are mafia.) You can find the thread HERE.
Mafia Goon wrote:
Hi [player], you are a Normal Teaching Assistant (Mafia Goon).

You are a teaching assistant, and you want to get rid of campers because more campers mean more work for you. Your teammates are PLAYER, Mafia ROLE NAME and PLAYER, Mafia ROLE NAME. You may communicate with them privately during the day in the quicktopic HERE. You and your teammates have a mandatory, assigned, factional kill every night. You all also have access to a 1-shot Strongman that may be used on a nightkill.

You win when parity is reached, or nothing can prevent it from being reached. (Parity means at least half of the living players are mafia.) You can find the thread HERE.


Alive (7)
midwaybear
snoozingnewt
Osmium_
sneakerman51 asdf334
olive0827 xzhang NDMath
BobDBuilder321
Mathletesv

Dead (6)
avanders, Residential Assistant (Town Jailkeeper), Day 1 Hang
aroodman, Normal Camper (Vanilla Townie), Night 1 Death
Madelyn, Annoyed Camper (Town Hider), Night 1 Death
mark888, Normal Camper (Vanilla Townie), Day 2 Hang
bigmath, Normal Camper (Vanilla Townie), Night 2 Death
Florinaapplezhu Made_in_2004, Normal Camper (Vanilla Townie), Day 3 Hang


Significant Events
D1: xzhang replaces olive0827
D1: asdf334 replaces sneakerman51
D1: Made_in_2004 replaces Florinaapplezhu
Day 1 Hang: avanders was Town Jailkeeper
Night 1 Results: aroodman was Vanilla Townie, Madelyn was Town Hider
D2: NDMath replaces xzhang
Day 2 Hang: mark888 was Vanilla Townie
Night 2 Results: bigmath was Vanilla Townie
Day 3 Hang: Made_in_2004 was Vanilla Townie
Game over: Mafia wins
Final Flavor


Warnings
 


The game is over.

Every night, choose a player. Kills on that player will fail unless one of the kills is a strongman. Actions performed by the player will fail, unless the player is a Hider.

You win when all threats to the Town are eliminated. You can find the thread [url=https://artofproblemsolving.com/community/c49h2148661]HERE[/url].
[/quote]
[quote=Town Vigilante]
Hi [player], you are a [color=#0f0]Camp Director (Town Vigilante)[/color].

You are the director of camp and thus can kick anyone out of camp. However, you can kick at most one person out per day because if you kick too many out, there will be a lot of complaints to you and their true intentions will not be seen. Every night, you may choose a player. They will be killed.

You win when all threats to the Town are eliminated. You can find the thread [url=https://artofproblemsolving.com/community/c49h2148661]HERE[/url].
[/quote]
[quote=Town Innocent Child]
Hi [player], you are a [color=#0f0]Watched Camper (Town Innocent Child)[/color].

Your room is next to a security camera that only you can access. However, nobody else can access the security camera or even knows about it. If you wish, you can reveal the security camera tape at any time, thus showing that you were in your room the whole night. Once per game, during the day, you may PM the mod (in your role PM) and state that you would like to be revealed. The mod will publicly (in the thread) reveal you as a [color=#0f0]Town Innocent Child[/color].

You win when all threats to the Town are eliminated. You can find the thread [url=https://artofproblemsolving.com/community/c49h2148661]HERE[/url].
[/quote]
[quote=VT]
Hi [player], you are a [color=#0f0]Normal Camper (Vanilla Townie)[/color].

You are a normal camper. You win when all threats to the Town are eliminated. You can find the thread [url=https://artofproblemsolving.com/community/c49h2148661]HERE[/url].
[/quote]
[/hide]

Hi [player], you are a [color=#f00]Annoyed Teaching Assistant (Mafia Hider)[/color].

You are a teaching assistant, and you want to get rid of campers because more campers mean more work for you. You hate sleeping in your own room because your room smells like a cross between a dead chicken and burnt oreos. As a result, you decided to never sleep in your own room, and always have sleepovers in other people's rooms, leaving before the adults force you into your own room (unless you choose to attempt to kill a person, for obvious reasons). Your teammates are PLAYER, [color=#f00]Mafia ROLE NAME[/color] and PLAYER, [color=#f00]Mafia ROLE NAME[/color]. You may communicate with them privately at any time in the quicktopic HERE. You and your teammates have a mandatory, assigned, factional kill every night. You all also have access to a 1-shot Strongman that may be used on a nightkill.

Every night, you may choose a player. Actions targeting you will fail (unless you are strongman killed). If the player you choose is mafia, you die. If the player you choose dies that night, you also die. (This action is not mandatory.)

You may not both hide and submit the kill on the same night.

You win when parity is reached, or nothing can prevent it from being reached. (Parity means at least half of the living players are mafia.) You can find the thread [url=https://artofproblemsolving.com/community/c49h2148661]HERE[/url].

Here's some setup spec:

1. asdf claims to be town hider.
2. We can't counterclaim asdf if he isn't town hider, because then 2 PR's would be outed (hider and another PR), not a very good scenario.
3. However, if there is another town hider, then I think they should claim. Mafia has only 1 strongman kill, and can't use it on both hiders (unless they visit each other), so in the end, we will have 1 hider, in which case we have a scenario similar to follow the cop. The differences are that hider doesn't say who they're targeting, and tries to avoid mafia to get as many conftowns as possible (reveals who they targeted next day). If the hider targets mafia, then we have an outed mafia, still pretty good.
4. If nobody claims town hider, then we can narrow down the setup possibilities.

Comments on town hider claiming (if there is another one)?

Votecount 1.13: EOD1

avanders (7): bigmath (#687), midwaybear (#824), asdf334 (#835), Mathletesv (#990), snoozingnewt (#1028), Osmium_ (#1030), mark888 (#1110)
midwaybear (5): BobDBuilder321 (#620), aroodman (#634), Made_in_2004 (#765), avanders (#812), xzhang (#826)

Not Voting (1): Madelyn (#1116)

Story and Flip (credit to kevin)
The people at that math camp were discussing about who they thought were the people planning to kill the rest of them. It was dinnertime, after their classes, on the same day that chess24 and kevinmathz were killed, and they were all sitting at a large table in the dining hall. While they were discussing about the situation, avanders went to get some ice cream. There was a long line of people from other camps, so avanders was in line for quite a while.

bigmath thought that avanders was one of the people planning to kill the rest of them, and told everyone else that he thought avanders went to get ice cream in order to avoid the discussion and guilt. Quite a few other people, including midwaybear and asdf334, were convinced about this theory, too. When avanders came back, he complained.

"I was filling my cup with 8 scoops of ice cream", complained avanders.
"Nuh-uh, you weren't; you were avoiding our discussion!" replied Mathletesv.
"Look at my ice cream, I was making it! It has a lot of oreo toppings and rainbow sprinkles, along with chocolate fudge and whipped cream, as you can see here!" avanders then took a bite on the ice cream. "Ahh, it tastes so good! Especially the oreos!"
"See? This is what I was talking about when I referred to avoiding the discussion! I'm convinced that avanders is plotting against us," shouted bigmath.
"OK, I have to go to the bathroom now", said avanders.

While avanders was in the bathroom, mark888 took out quite a few tide pods he got earlier that day from the bin of tide pods back in the dorms. Opening them with his bare hands, he snuck them into avanders's ice cream, with approval of most of the other people. Quickly, he then washed his hands at the sink close by, and returned a few seconds before avanders was in sight.

When avanders returned once again, he shouted "IT'S NOT ME! I'M PRETTY SURE midwaybear IS ONE OF THE PEOPLE PLOTTING AGAINST US! LOOK AT HIM!" A few other people agreed with him, but still, the majority was against him so nobody decided to point out that he was about to eat tide pod cream. In that time, avanders ate a couple more fries dipped in ketchup. He subsequently ate a couple of oreos and started eating the "frosting".

When eating the "frosting", everyone was looking at avanders, who was ignorant about what was about to happen. He wondered to himself why the ice cream became kind of bitter all of a sudden, but continued eating.

After finishing the ice cream and walking back to the dorm rooms, avanders felt queasy. He felt burning in his cheeks and tongue and started having trouble breathing. avanders screamed "WHAT DID YOU ALL DO TO MY ICE CREAM?!". That was when he knew about the tide pods. avanders ate poisoned ice cream with poisoned oreos, the poison being from the tide pods. He then died of suffocation because the tide pods' detergent stopped him from breathing.

After avanders died, the remaining twelve people in the math camp used his finger to open his phone. All the chats were typical and the most recent one said that he was going to play surviv.io tonight with his friends and that the night before, he was grinding fortnite and got a 24 kill streak. There was just no way that he was one of the people plotting against the rest of them.

The "Notes" app of avanders's phone also had something. It revealed avanders's true role, but what he planned to do tonight was TBD. All they knew was that they had accused and killed the wrong person. The twelve remaining people then played Fish, Mafia, Clash Royale, Mao, and Brawl Stars, while eating Hot Fries and ramen, in order to take their mind off of what happened that day.

avanders ate poisoned ice cream topped with poisoned oreos Day 1. He was a Residential Assistant (Town Jailkeeper).


Night 1 starts now and ends Saturday, June 27 at 3:30 PM Central Time (48 hours minus 7 minutes from now). Do not post here.

post_rendered:
Why Some People Should Stop Formulating Night Action Plans
Let's start off by assuming we hang a VT today.

Now we're at night.

Mafia has the following night actions they can do (This is assuming asdf is hider):

1. Kill a random VT. People are saying they will probably try getting asdf hung if he survives another night, so mafia can easily WIFOM this. On top of that, it's MYLO tomorrow, so even if asdf does flip hider, it's too late by the time we finally get some conftowns.
2. Strongman asdf. I personally wouldn't do this as mafia, and I find it unlikely because it takes all the WIFOM and confusion and wondering if asdf is hider away, making scumhunting easier for town. It also leaves a conftown, Osmium, which mafia doesn't want, and which wouldn't have if they didn't kill asdf.
3. Kill a possible asdf target in hopes of getting 2 night kills and advancing to LYLO. Now we're going to assume they do indeed succeed in killing 2 people (since we can't tell the difference between #1 and #3 if asdf doesn't die). This results in the same thing as #2, except that one more person is dead (so it's LYLO), which is pretty good, even with 1 conftown.

Now, if we assume asdf is mafia, then mafia only has 1 option.

1. Kill a random (or maybe not so random) VT. Now asdf is alive, and mafia can use WIFOM to their advantage to make sure asdf doesn't get hung.

Our problem is that we can't tell the difference between #1 of asdf is hider and #1 of asdf is mafia.

Which is a pretty big problem.

People trying to formulate night action plans are expanding the problem.

Why:

Let's take the current night action plan as an example.

Current Night Action Plan: asdf says who he is hiding behind.

Now, let's assume asdf is hider again, because it is very possible (Note that even though asdf might not be hider, you're taking a pretty big risk by making him say who he's hiding behind. Also, we don't take risks right before MYLO).

This makes #3 very appealing to mafia, as they can kill who asdf is hiding behind. This brings us straight to LYLO, which is worse than MYLO in this case.

It also makes #2 very appealing to mafia, since they can try framing someone, or just use WIFOM to say their partner was framed, which makes the end result just as bad as the confusion we have today.

All in all, formulating a night action plan makes all options (1, 2, and 3) appealing to mafia, and we can't even end up with a sense of what mafia might have even done during the night. Note that having a sense of what mafia might have done isn't a big advantage, because there's still WIFOM, but it's a still a very very small advantage. On top of that, formulating a night action plan doesn't give us any concrete information anyways, so there's no point.

I think what I have just written gives me a good reason to suspect people who keep pushing this night action plan, because there's nothing good about it. We're in a hole, and by formulating a night action plan, we're just digging deeper.

Majority is on. With 10 alive it takes 6 to hang and 5 to no hang.

Flavor and Flip
In the morning, the people at the math camp were all solving Diophantine Equations when BobDBuilder321 said that he thought mark888 was part of the conspirators planning against them. midwaybear, Made_in_2004, and bigmath agreed. Knowing the incident of the tide pods the day before, mark888 made sure he did not eat anything after BobDBuilder321 accused him.

It was dinner and he was really hungry. mark888 saw really tasty stuff in the cafeteria. kevinmathz had always said that the beef is good, but to not eat anything with a hard crust. There was beef and an authentic dish filled with noodles and sauce. mark888 got the food from the cafeteria, and like avanders, he went to the bathroom. When coming back, he ate the food; it tasted good and later he still felt all good. Looks like the other members of the math camp wouldn't kill him.

After dinner, the 10 people at the math camp walked back to the dorms. In the elevator, bigmath said he thought mark888 was one of the conspirators, too. The elevator stopped at the fourth floor, and they all went out. Mathletesv ran to his room, and Osmium_, NDMath and asdf334 walked away towards the lounge. BobDBuilder321, midwaybear, Made_in_2004, and bigmath were outside and talking about how they suspected mark888.

mark888 overheard them. "Why are you guys accusing me?"
"You seem pretty suspicious", replied the four of them.
mark888 stepped out of the escalator. "Why?"
"Because".
"I give up arguing with you guys".

mark888 turned the other way, still between the elevator doors, when snoozingnewt jabbed the CLOSE button. "Too bad, you're gonna be dead", he said. The elevator was unable to crush him but forced him between the doors. And right then, snoozingnewt clicked the "Dial 911" and "5" buttons on the elevator. The alarm sounded, and the elevator went up. It took snoozingnewt and half of mark888 up to the fifth floor. The eight other people noticed and when snoozingnewt went back (down the stairs this time), BobDBuilder321 was holding mark888's phone. And in the text messages, was.....nothing. The nine remaining campers went back to their rooms to cry.

mark888 was killed by an elevator. He was a Normal Camper (Vanilla Townie).

After dinner, the 10 people at the math camp walked back to the dorms. In the elevator, bigmath said he thought mark888 was one of the conspirators, too. The elevator stopped at the fourth floor, and they all went out. Mathletesv ran to his room, and Osmium_, NDMath and asdf334 walked away towards the lounge. BobDBuilder321, midwaybear, Made_in_2004, and bigmath were outside and talking about how they suspected mark888.

mark888 overheard them. "Why are you guys accusing me?"
"You seem pretty suspicious", replied the four of them.
mark888 stepped out of the escalator. "Why?"
"Because".
"I give up arguing with you guys".

mark888 turned the other way, still between the elevator doors, when snoozingnewt jabbed the CLOSE button. "Too bad, you're gonna be dead", he said. The elevator was unable to crush him but forced him between the doors. And right then, snoozingnewt clicked the "Dial 911" and "5" buttons on the elevator. The alarm sounded, and the elevator went up. It took snoozingnewt and half of mark888 up to the fifth floor. The eight other people noticed and when snoozingnewt went back (down the stairs this time), BobDBuilder321 was holding mark888's phone. And in the text messages, was.....nothing. The nine remaining campers went back to their rooms to cry.

[b]mark888 was killed by an elevator. He was a [color=#0f0]Normal Camper (Vanilla Townie)[/color].[/b]
[/hide]

Night 2 starts now and ends Thursday, July 9, at 12:00 PM Central Time (in 48 hours from now). Do not post here.[/color]

post_rendered:
Endgame Flavor
The morning the tragic incident of bigmath mysteriously dying occurred, the members of the math camp were really paranoid of each other. Quickly, snoozingnewt pointed to Made_in_2004 who was solving inequalities with Jensen's away from them all after breakfast. And soon, people followed.

Made_in_2004 heard people thought he was a conspirator, and was getting super pissed about it. While he was solving an inequality, snoozingnewt, Osmium_, asdf334 and NDMath plotted to kill Made_in_2004 by pushing him off the stairs. They were going to get midwaybear to push him, but when they dragged him to the staircase, midwaybear refused. "I'm not going to do such a deed", he complained.

Mathletesv then came, and with one strong push, he thrusted Made_in_2004 out of sight. He sent midwaybear down with Made_in_2004, and then the others knew he was one of the conspirators.

Made_in_2004 was pushed off a flight of stairs. He was a Normal Camper (Vanilla Townie).
midwaybear was pushed off a flight of stairs. He was a Normal Camper (Vanilla Townie).

snoozingnewt was charging Mathletesv (who was standing at the edge of the staircase) when asdf334 yelled "MATHLETESV, WATCH YOUR BACK!" Mathletesv turned and jumped onto the railing, then walljumped so high that snoozingnewt ran right past him and fell down the super long spiral staircase, out of sight too. Then, Mathletesv ran to Osmium_'s room, which was open. Osmium_ left the drama and thought that everything was normal, but in no time, Mathletesv thrusted him out the window. Osmium_ held onto a tree branch that he caught in the fall. While that happened, asdf334 and BobDBuilder321 cornered NDMath and killed him. They then took the elevator down to the first floor, where they met Mathletesv and all three of them awaited to see how long Osmium_ could hold on to the tree branch while having a picnic.

snoozingnewt ran off a flight of stairs. He was a Normal Camper (Vanilla Townie).
NDMath was killed by asdf334 and BobDBuilder321. He was a Normal Camper (Vanilla Townie).

Osmium_ saw no hope in getting down, so he knew he would have to find a place on the tree to settle for a long time. He climbed to a slightly higher trunk, and saw a yellow-orange-golden almost-ellipse shaped thing with hexagonal scales on it, and imagined geometry. He tried to grab it, then attempted to use it as a weapon against the three mafia below him.

As he grabbed it, though, a swarm of bees came out of that object, and Osmium_ realized that he tried to grab a beehive. After being stun by a few bees, Osmium_ was distracted, and fell down 40 feet. Meanwhile, asdf334, BobDBuilder321 and Mathletesv ran towards bigmath's Lamborghini, which Mathletesv had the keys to because he killed bigmath. They ran in, and in a minute, they drove away and were gone before anyone else came.

Osmium_ fell from a tree. He was a Normal Camper (Vanilla Townie).

Congrats to the staff (mafia): asdf334, the Annoyed Teaching Assistant (Mafia Hider), BobDBuilder321, a Normal Teaching Assistant (Mafia Goon), and Mathletesv, a Normal Teaching Assistant (Mafia Goon) for winning!
